feedback.technicalIssues: No, the games all worked properly and ran smoothly.
feedback.confusingParts: Nothing was confusing. The "hardest" part was learning all the new controls for each game.
feedback.suggestions: A couple of the games didn't feel fun to play due to camera/ collision issues, otherwise I enjoyed these small games.
feedback.funCriteria: Responsive, intuitive controls are the most important part of any game. Additionally, the camera should not impede gameplay.
